steps.description: Rust integration test for Lock flow
steps.command: cd src/api/api && SQLX_OFFLINE=true cargo test --test sequence_e2e_test sequence_lock -- --nocapture
steps.expected: Test exits with code 0; stdout confirms lock_id assigned, SR_0 computed via SHA3-256("QS_LOCK_V1" || chain_id || asset || amount || dest_addr || expiry || nonce || pk_dilithium), and lockWithSR0 transaction submitted to L1 Vault at 0x6F889C00a5e674ab0b9403AfBa0fBEbe30511c67 on Sepolia; no panic or FAILED line in output

steps.description: Playwright integration spec for Consumer Lock
steps.command: cd src/frontend/web && npx playwright test e2e/integration/lock.integration.spec.ts --reporter=json
steps.expected: All Playwright tests in lock.integration.spec.ts pass (status: 'passed' for every test in JSON output); UI lock creation flow reaches success state and a corresponding DB row is present; zero test failures reported

steps.description: Verify lock row was created and pk_dilithium populated
steps.command: psql "$DATABASE_URL" -t -A -c "SELECT lock_id, status, length(pk_dilithium) FROM locks ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;"
steps.expected: Exactly one row returned; status is either 'pending' or 'locked'; length(pk_dilithium) is exactly 1952 bytes (Dilithium public key size)

steps.description: Verify totalLocked increased on Sepolia Vault
steps.expected: Returned uint256 value is strictly greater than 0 wei, confirming at least one Locked event has been emitted by the L1 Vault and assets are held by the contract

acceptance_criteria: Backend integration test exits with code 0 and stdout confirms SR_0 computed and lockWithSR0 submitted — no FAILED or panic lines present
Playwright lock.integration.spec.ts reports zero failed tests and the JSON output contains status: 'passed' for every test case
The most recent row in the locks table has status = 'locked' and length(pk_dilithium) = 1952 exactly
Sepolia Vault totalLocked() returns a value strictly greater than 0 wei
No silent fallback or hardcoded address appears in any layer's trace or log output
